chunks.text:
[Document: MCLN EX24 Cigarette Returns Interface Configuration Guide]

EX2 4 – Cigarette Returns Interface Contents  1 System Code Configuration  1.1 Add or Enable Global System Code  1.2 Add EX24 System Code  System Code Configuration Add or Enable Global System Code Navigate to the System Codes (Configuration) UI If system code C- 000 (Global Extension Control) does not yet exist, click Add Populate the followin g information: 232410 174433 Note : The checkbox “System code parameters exist” will auto populate upon completion of subsequent steps for adding parameters, and it is un - editable to the user. Click Save . Next, click the Code ID’s Action Button The System Code ID’s screen is displayed right 0 0 0 Click A dd . Populate the following information provided Click S ave to save the Code ID. Next, Click the Parameters Action button located on the bottom right of the screen to Navigate back to System Code Parameters screen System Co de Parameters Screen is displayed Click A dd button. 344805 151933 Populate the following information provided Click S ave . 2343785 9036050 Page 4 of = NUMPAGES 13 13 0 0 Page 4 of = NUMPAGES 13 13 Click on the Parameters tab 189290 417782 C heck the box to Enable system code Click S ave Add EX 2 4 System Code Navigate to System Codes UI Filter for Code Type 000 Select the Custom Code 000 record Click Code IDs on the bottom right hand corner Click Add to add a Code ID Fill in the following details for EX 2 4 Code ID Click Save Navigate to the Parameters tab and ensure that the Enablement Flag is turned on . If not enabled, enable it and click Save
